name: modify-video
description: Modify a video with style transfer and prompt-based editing

first_frame.description: An optional first frame of the video to modify. This should be a modified version of the original first frame, it will be used to guide the video modification.
first_frame.title: First Frame

mode.description: How closely the output should follow the source video. Adhere: very close, for subtle enhancements. Flex: allows more stylistic change while keeping recognizable elements. Reimagine: loosely follows the source, for dramatic or transformative changes.
mode.title: mode

prompt.description: A prompt to guide the video modification
prompt.title: Prompt

video.description: The video to modify. Maximum video size is 100mb. Maximum video duration is 30 seconds.
video.title: Video
